features.name: Admin UI — About / Services / Footer sections
Public render — replace hardcoded sections with fetch

checks: node --check Controllers/homeContentController.js
node --check Models/aboutSectionModel.js
node --check Models/serviceModel.js
node --check Models/footerPersonModel.js
node --check app.js
node config/migrate_db_schema.js  # expect 4 ✅ Created on fresh DB
node app.js &  # start server
curl -s http://localhost:5500/api/public/about | grep -q '"success":true'
curl -s http://localhost:5500/api/public/services | node -e 'process.stdin.pipe(require("stream").Writable({write:(c)=>{const d=JSON.parse(c);process.exit(d.data.length===3?0:1)}}))'
curl -s http://localhost:5500/api/public/footer-persons | grep -q '"slot":1'
test $(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:5500/api/admin/about) -eq 401
node --check Views/admin/script.js
Manual: open http://localhost:5500/admin → login → click About → verify form pre-filled with 'MANY BEAUTIFUL PLACES...'
Manual: change banner to 'TEST_F02_BANNER' → Save → toast success → reload → value persists
Manual: click Services → 3 cards visible with seed data
Manual: upload image on Service 1 → preview thumbnail appears → Save → reload → image persists
Manual: click Footer → 2 persons with avatar + email + phones + FB
Manual: enter 'javascript:alert(1)' in Person 1 Facebook URL → Save → toast 'phải bắt đầu https://' (client + server)
DevTools console clean across all 3 sections
Open http://localhost:5500/main in incognito → no console errors
grep -c 'MANY BEAUTIFUL PLACES' Views/main/index.html  # expect 0 (text now from DB)
grep -c 'QUANDUONG COMPLEX' Views/main/index.html  # expect 0 (was already from DB)
grep -c 'Hoang Long' Views/main/index.html  # expect 0
Network tab on /main shows 3 new fetches: /api/public/about, /api/public/services, /api/public/footer-persons all 200
Edit banner to 'F03_LIVE_TEST' in admin → reload /main in incognito → banner shows 'F03_LIVE_TEST'
Edit Person 1 Facebook to '<script>alert(1)</script>' in DB (mysql shell) → reload /main → text shown literal, no alert popup
Mobile + iPad responsive identical to baseline
